name: Wilting Tsubaki

abilities.name: Hazardous (Burning)
abilities.text: Friendly Shadow markers gain the Hazardous (Burning) terrain trait.

abilities.name: Hit and Run
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may drain a (c) to declare the Walk action, ignoring engagement.

actions.name: Drag Into Shadow
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5" toward a Shadow marker in its LoS. While moving, the target may move through allies.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

markers.name: Shadow
markers.text: During the start phase of turn 1, make up to five Shadow markers anywhere on the table, not in the enemy deployment zone.

extraction_notes: Shadow markers are created during start phase of turn 1, with placement restrictions
Hazardous (Burning) is a terrain trait applied to Shadow markers
Hit and Run ability applies to peon Last Blossom models as well (all friendly Last Blossom models)
Drag Into Shadow is a signature attack action (indicated by the signature icon before the action name)
